site.name: ValoraAI
site.title: Valora: Sell & Buy Smarter with AI
site.description: Sell your used electronics, gadgets, and more with ease on Valora! Our AI helps you create perfect listings from photos, suggests categories, and streamlines your selling process.

hero.title: Selling Your Stuff Just Got a Whole Lot Easier
hero.subtitle: Valora's AI transforms how you sell used goods - making it quicker, more intelligent, and incredibly simple.

intelligentFeatures.title: Intelligent Features
intelligentFeatures.subtitle: Valora's AI enhances the experience for everyone, making selling effortless and buying more informed.
intelligentFeatures.smartItemRecognitionDescription: Enjoy clearer and more accurately categorized ads, making it easier to find exactly what you're looking for.
intelligentFeatures.clearAdsDescription: Valora's AI writes engaging, informative descriptions, saving you time and attracting more interest.
intelligentFeatures.aiPoweredCommunicationDescription: Get quick answers to your questions and experience a smooth, responsive communication process when discussing an item.

seo.title: Browse Products
seo.description: Explore a wide range of products available for sale. Find electronics, fashion, home goods, collectibles, and more.

browse.noProductsFound: No products found in this category.

registerDialog.title: Create an Account
registerDialog.description: Browse our categories to find what you need, or post your own items for sale.

loginDialog.title: Welcome back!
loginDialog.description: Please sign in to your account.

authDialog.passwordMinLength: Password should be at least 6 characters.
authDialog.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email address is already registered.
authDialog.loginFailed: Failed to log in. Please try again.
authDialog.registerFailed: Failed to register. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.

footer.aboutDescription: Valora's AI enhances the experience for everyone, making selling effortless and buying more informed.

productDescription.noDescription: No description available for this product.

chat.noMessagesYet: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
chat.tipClearMessages: Be clear and concise in your messages.
chat.tipAgreePriceMeeting: Agree on a price and meeting point before sharing personal details.

postWizard.unlockSellingDescription: Create a free account in seconds to post your ad and let AI assist you.
postWizard.registrationSuccessDescription: You're all set. Time to hit 'Submit' to publish your ad.
postWizard.productCreatedDescription: Your product has been successfully created.
postWizard.photoToOfferTitle: Turn Your Photo into a Perfect Ad,
postWizard.photoToOfferDescription: Upload your item's photo, and our intelligent AI will help you create an optimized listing designed to sell quickly and effortlessly.
postWizard.aiSuggestionsReadyTitle: Almost There! Finalize Your Smart Ad Details

photoUploader.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop image or click here
photoUploader.uploading: Your photo is being analyzed by our AI assistant...

galleryUpload.recommededToUpload: Recommended to add 3-5 photos from different angles in good lighting conditions.

adForm.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., A Nintendo Switch in great condition.
adForm.pricePositive: Price must be a positive number.

ads.title: My Ads
ads.adUpdatedDescription: Your ad has been successfully updated.
